name: fixtures: each g-react-001..010 has a positive fixture (input expected to trigger the rule) at evals/fixtures/react/<rule-id>/positive/
command: for i in 001 002 003 004 005 006 007 008 009 010; do test -d "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/react/g-react-$i/positive" || { echo "FAIL g-react-$i positive missing" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
